form.formComment: Resuming after a seven months break. Finished off last campaign fourth of 10 at Craon September 6 over 1650m, soft track; 2.75 len behind Le Landin with 56.5kg at $4.90. On debut fourth of 7 at Chantilly July 20 over 1400m, soft track; 5.5 len behind Gentlemanlike with 58kg at $6.80. Anticipating a bright start to this prep.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Jumped at long odds at debut, 9th of 13 at Chantilly All Weather on March 16 over 1600m, 11 len behind Mr Lope Cen with 58kg at $28. Fitter and can improve.

form.formComment: At debut, raced on the pace before fading 7th of 12 at Saint-Cloud on March 19 over 2000m, slow going 11 len behind Wiki carrying 58kg at $13. Big improver and expected to go well.

form.formComment: Was at big odds at debut, ran last of 8 at Chantilly All Weather on March 26 over 1900m, 27 len behind Quantas carrying 56kg at $45. Needs to show a lot more.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up ran last of 8 at Cagnes-sur-Mer on February 21 over 1500m, 14 len behind Black Solea with 58kg at $28. Second-up ran last of 9 at Marseille Vivaux on March 9 over 1500m, 25 len behind Senatrice with 56.5kg at $48. Has ability and can bounce back.
